page: Vultr vcg-a40-24c-120g-48vram is a GPU-accelerated virtual server within the Cloud GPU family. The system features an Intel x86_64 processor configured with 24 vCPUs and 24 physical cores, operating with 1.0 thread per core. This CPU allocation is shared, which represents a potential performance tradeoff under sustained, high-concurrency host workloads.

The instance is equipped with 120.0 GB of system memory, yielding 5.0 GB of RAM per core. Acceleration is provided by a single NVIDIA Ampere A40 GPU containing 48 GB of dedicated VRAM. This hardware profile is designed for workloads requiring substantial graphics memory and parallel processing capabilities, such as large-scale rendering, machine learning inference, and data science tasks.

Local storage consists of a 1400 GB NVMe SSD, providing high-speed read and write access for local datasets and operating system files. Additionally, the configuration includes one complimentary public IPv4 address. The combination of high-capacity NVMe storage and a professional-grade Ampere GPU offers a dense resource profile for data-heavy applications.
description: Vultr vcg-a40-24c-120g-48vram is a GPU-accelerated virtual server configured with an Intel x86_64 architecture. It features 24 vCPUs and 24 physical cores on a shared CPU allocation model, paired with 120.0 GB of system memory. Graphics and parallel computing acceleration are delivered by a single NVIDIA Ampere A40 GPU with 48 GB of dedicated VRAM. For local data storage, the instance includes a 1400 GB NVMe SSD, facilitating fast read and write operations. The server also comes with one complimentary public IPv4 address. This hardware configuration is designed for workloads such as machine learning inference, data science, and 3D rendering that benefit from high VRAM capacity and local NVMe storage, though the shared CPU allocation should be considered for CPU-bound tasks.
og_description: Vultr vcg-a40-24c-120g-48vram is a GPU-accelerated virtual server featuring 24 Intel vCPUs, 120 GB RAM, a 1400 GB NVMe SSD, and one NVIDIA Ampere A40 GPU with 48 GB of dedicated VRAM.

tagline: A GPU-accelerated virtual server featuring an NVIDIA Ampere A40 GPU, 120 GB RAM, and 1400 GB of NVMe SSD storage.

24 Intel x86_64 vCPUs with shared CPU allocation
120.0 GB system memory (5.0 GB per core)

Suited for machine learning inference, rendering, and data science
